ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs City And County Of San Francisco And People Of The State Of Californias Notice Of Motion And Motion For: 1) Default Judgment And Injunction Against Defendants Teresa Roliz,, Individually, And Teresa Roliz, As Trustee Of The 61-65a Henry Street Irrevocalbe Trust; And 2) Default Judgment Against Defendant Maire Dwan
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Teresa Roliz, individually, Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust and Maire Dwan, Individually, and for entry of permanent injunction.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Jill Cannon, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Teresa Roliz, individually, Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust or Maire Dwan.
Plaintiffs' complaint for injunctive relief was filed on May 4, 2017 and served on May 11, 2017.
Notice of Pendency of Action was filed with the Clerk's Office on Juen 7, 2017.
Defaults were entered against defendants Teresa Roliz, individually, Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust and Maire Dwan on May 24, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 24, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 20, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and the People of the State of California, by and through Dennis J. Herrera, City Attorney for the City and County of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendants Teresa Roliz, individually, Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust and Maire Dwan, as follows:

Plaintiffs shall have judgment jointly and severally against Defendants Teresa Roliz, individually, and Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust in the amount of $309,000.00.

Plaintiffs shall have judgment severally against defendant Teresa Roliz, as Trustee of the 61-65A Henry Street Irrevocable Trust for $133,076.75, which is comprised of $132,762.50 in attorney fees, and $314.25 in costs.

Plaintiffs shall have judgment severally against defendant Maire Dwan for $30,000.00.

Additionally, defendants are restrained and enjoined, either directly or indirectly, through an agent, officer, manager, representative, employee, or anyone else acting on defendant's behalf, from engaging in any of the acts proscribed by paragraph 3, subsections a through s, of the default permanent injunction submitted in conjunction with plaintiffs' proposed default judgment.

Proposed judment, and default permanent injunction, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
